backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing an ICDex grid trading bot with order placement/cancellation, bot start/stop controls, configurable grid parameters, activity logging, and a recurring timer for automated order management.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting a fix for the Market Data LIVE section, linking the affected files (MarketDataPanel.tsx and useQueries.ts) and specifying the requirement to surface ICDex fetch errors instead of showing blank dashes.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference for the build plan.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, covering background, foreground, card, border, chart, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React app, setting the page title to 'ICDex ICP/ckUSDT Trading Bot' and mounting the app via the /src/main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes the full dashboard layout with a sticky header, three-row responsive grid of panels (control, config, market data, grid preview, open orders, trade history, activity log), and a footer with caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/ActivityLogPanel: React component that fetches and displays backend log entries in reverse-chronological order with event-type color coding, loading skeletons, error state, and an empty state message.
Bot control panel component providing start/stop buttons with loading states, a live status indicator, config summary, and error banners that distinguish network-reachability errors from general failures.
frontend/src/components/ConfigurationPan: Renders a configuration form for bot settings (spread, grid orders, refresh interval) with validation, loading skeletons, and a save button that simulates saving since config is read-only from the backend.
frontend/src/components/GridPreviewTable: Displays a scrollable table of current grid price levels split into buy/sell sides, with a computed mid price, loading skeletons, error state, and a manual refresh button.
Shows live market data (mid price, best bid/ask, order book levels) with a dynamic status badge (LIVE/IDLE/STALE/ERROR) and auto-refreshing relative timestamp.
Lists open orders sorted by side and price with buy/sell counts, and provides a cancel-all button that triggers a mutation with pending/success state feedback.
frontend/src/components/TradeHistoryPane: Displays a reverse-chronological trade history table with price, quantity, status (filled/cancelled/open), and relative timestamps, including loading and error states.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor via React Query, using the current Internet Identity for authenticated calls or falling back to an anonymous actor, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, wrapping DFINITY's AuthClient to handle login, logout, and persisted identity state across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines TanStack Query hooks for fetching and mutating trading bot state (status, config, market data, orders, logs) from the ICP canister actor, with polling intervals and canister health-check guards.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing JetBrains Mono font and Tailwind directives, defining a terminal-themed dark color palette via CSS custom properties (oklch) and utility component classes for trading UI elements.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with TanStack QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with JetBrains Mono fonts, oklch-based semantic color tokens (buy/sell/terminal), custom box shadows, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing the ICDex ICP/ckUSDT trading bot, tracking known issues (Market Data LIVE showing zeroed values due to silent ICDex fetch failures) and pending fix requests for both frontend error surfacing and backend structured error reporting.
